debug_info.goal:
X : Sequent
tab : Tableau [] X
s t : PathIn tab
⊢ t ∈ all_cEdge X tab s ↔ s ⋖_ t ∨ s ♥ t

failed_attempts:
simp [all_cEdge]
  constructor
  · rintro ⟨_, h⟩; exact h
  · intro h; exact ⟨pathsOf_mem t, h⟩

simp only [all_cEdge, repeatsOf, List.mem_append, List.mem_filter]
  constructor
  · rintro (⟨_, h⟩ | ⟨_, h⟩)
    · exact Or.inl h
    · exact Or.inr h
  · intro h
    have ht : t ∈ pathsOf tab := mem_pathsOf_tab t
    rcases h with h | h
    · left; exact ⟨ht, h⟩
    · right; exact ⟨ht, h⟩

simp [all_cEdge, List.mem_filter]
  exact ⟨And.right, fun h => ⟨pathsOf_mem t, h⟩⟩

simp [all_cEdge, repeatsOf, childrenOf_iff]
  cases h : companionOf s
  · simp [h]
    intro c
    rw [← companionOf_iff, h] at c
    contradiction
  · simp [h]
    rw [companionOf_iff, h]
    simp

simp [all_cEdge]
  exact ⟨λ h => h.2, λ h => ⟨allPaths_mem t, h⟩⟩

simp [all_cEdge, List.mem_filter]
  exact ⟨fun h => h.2, fun h => ⟨PathIn.mem_pathsOf _, h⟩⟩
simp only [all_cEdge, Finset.mem_toList, Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_univ, true_and]
